_note: Single source of truth for the live site and the Studio editor. Website copy is English. Each item has: title, description (one line), detail (markdown, longer), links[], image (+imageWidth/imageHeight in px, for CLS-free rendering).

profile.name: Stan Shih
profile.role: AI Product builder · Future Startup Founder
profile.tagline: I build stuff I like (and that are fun).

items.title: Colonist.io Stats Tracker
items.description: A Chrome extension that keeps track of live dice rolls and resource count (and many other features

items.title: LINE Notify+
items.description: An Android app that provides better and more customizable LINE notifications for Android users (as compared with native notifications

items.title: Claude Status Monitor
items.description: Real-time Claude service status widget on claude.ai — uptime charts, live incidents, and alerts at a glance

items.title: This Site — Featherweight Edition
items.description: The page you're reading has a twin built for pure speed: zero JavaScript, system fonts, nothing blocks first paint.
items.detail: Same content, opposite philosophy — no hedgehog, no quest, just one line that times itself. About 6 KB gzipped, ~0.2 s edge TTFB, Lighthouse 99. On a slow connection this site quietly sends you there instead.

items.title: This Site — Interactive Edition
items.description: The full version of this site, with a resident paper-doll guide, an exploration quest, and MY PICTURE that runs away from your cursor

items.title: Antnest Chatbot
items.description: A LINE AI Bot + admin dashboard for a dessert shop (won Zeabur hackathon  silver medal with it yay

items.title: ETF Tracker
items.description: A personal dashboard that tracks Taiwan ETFs, US stocks, and BTC in one place - basically to keep track of my personal ETF

items.title: ClaudePulse
items.description: A Windows monitor for multiple Claude Code sessions. Shows a notification when a session is finished or needs further handling

items.title: YouTube Precise Time
items.description: Shows precise YouTube upload time, down to the second, on videos and Shorts. You no longer need to wonder when "two weeks ago " was

items.title: Course Checker
items.description: A web app that checks how many more credits I need to graduate

patent.title: Travel Smart Collision-Avoidance Warning System
patent.imageAlt: First page of United States patent US 10,699,576 B1
patent.blurb: A vehicle-to-vehicle collision-warning system I invented in high school, inspired by my dad's Tesla. Granted patents in the US and Taiwan.
highlights: Cited by GM Cruise, Huawei, and Plus.ai
Gold medal, International Salon of Inventions and New Technologies; Silver, International Warsaw Invention Show

points: Named as Nothing Taiwan Community founder, invited on stage to personally introduce the product at Nothing's Taiwan launch event — DigiTimes' coverage frames it as breaking from the usual vendor-led launch format (digitimes.com.tw/tech/dt/n/shwnws.asp?id=0000717826_QWF75N3734AXQJ553403G, paywalled).
Also named as Nothing's senior fan representative in Storm Media (風傳媒) and WIN News launch-day coverage (storm.mg/article/5345488, winnews.com.tw/220759).

education.school: Kang Chiao International School (康橋國際學校)
education.note: Gold medalist, Ukraine International Invention Exhibition (youngest competitor), for a vehicle collision-avoidance warning system later patented as US10699576B1. Admitted to Carnegie Mellon University (Information Systems) and NTNU Computer Science via the special-admissions track.
